title: Quality Optimized
description: A performance focused modpack with some major quality of life features.
body:
**Quality Optimized** is a [Fabric]([https://quiltmc.org/](https://fabricmc.net)) modpack that's designed similarly to [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) but includes more performance and quality of life mods. It prioritizes performance to ensure that even on lower-end hardware, players can enjoy higher fps without compromising on visual quality. Some of these mods include:

[**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium): A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance.

[**More Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling): A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance.

[**ImmediatelyFast**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast): Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft.

[**Nvidium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium): Fast nvidia only rendering engine for sodium.

[**Fastload**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastload): Modifies how worlds are loaded to speed up loading times.

This pack also includes a range of quality of life features that make the game look more appealing, more enjoyable, and user friendly. Some of these mods include:

[**ESSENTIAL Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential): Play together without a server. Customize your character. And more.

[**Iris Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris): A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs.

[**Vivecraft**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft): The mod that transforms Minecraft into an exceptional VR experience in room-scale or seated play!

[**Better Block Sounds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbs): Updating old blocks with new, better block sounds.

[**Visuality**](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality): Little visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles.

If you have any issues with the modpack, it will most likely be fixed in a future update.
